race.comment: Endless chances. THE FINAL WORD (2) tackled a tougher race returning to Darwin last time and was well off best. Best figures stack right up and has form here. Like many of these coming off a below-par run but will sit handy and should go close on best. Same goes for DOLCE D'AMOUR (6) who was beaten six lengths here last time when well fancied. Better than that latest effort and can improve sharply. SASS (8) is honest and returned with another good run. Fitter and on good record here is drawn to take catching. MIAMI BABY (7) placed here fresh and strips fitter. Has to be included. DANIHER (1) has a tricky gate but is back in form and will be winding up strongly.
